ops.title: Implement Runbook core (Phase 1: model types/ops/pack, position encoding, fold, store, trail)

ops.text: go build ./... , go vet ./... , go test -race -count=1 ./... all green with new runbook pack round-trip, fold lifecycle/concurrency, compaction state-neutrality, and store create/dedupe/resolve/cache tests present (spec: doc 72b6b52)
